chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Spl. S.T.R.A. No. 171 of 2017 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________ 1) For hearing of main case. 2) For hearing of Misc. No.631/2018. 22.04.2025. None present on behalf of the Applicant nor any intimation received. Same was the position in the first round. The Matter was kept aside but again nobody has turned up. In view of such position, this Reference Application is dismissed for non-prosecution. ACTING CHIEF JUSTICE J U D G E Nasir/
